# 0.5.0 / 2022-04-12

  * Add `priority` option
  * Add `sameSite=none` option
  * Fix `maxAge` option to reject invalid values
  * Fix parsing cookies with `=` in the value
  * Fix `sameSite` option to be case-insensitive
  * deps: eslint-plugin-markdown@3.0.0
  * deps: nyc@15.1.0
  * deps: supertest@6.2.2

# 0.4.1 / 2020-04-21

  * Fix `maxAge` option to not throw on non-number values
  * Fix repository URL in package.json
  * deps: eslint@7.24.0
  * deps: eslint-plugin-markdown@2.2.0
  * deps: eslint-plugin-import@2.22.1
  * deps: eslint-plugin-node@11.1.0

# 0.4.0 / 2019-05-15

  * Add `SameSite=None` support
  * Fix `maxAge` option to accept `0`
  * Fix `sameSite: true` to send `SameSite=Strict` attribute
  * Improve error message when `encode` is not a function
  * Support `sameSite` values regardless of case
  * deps: eslint@5.16.0
  * deps: mocha@6.1.4
  * deps: supertest@4.0.2
  * perf: improve performance of parsing cookie values

# 0.3.1 / 2016-05-26

  * Fix `sameSite` option to accept boolean and string values
  * Fix array-based `expires` to use correct millisecond conversion
  * deps: eslint@2.10.2
  * deps: mocha@2.5.3

# 0.3.0 / 2016-01-17

  * Add `sameSite` option
    - Replaces `firstPartyOnly` option, never implemented by browsers
  * Fix `maxAge` option to not throw when value is a string
  * Improve error message when `expires` is not a `Date`
  * deps: eslint@1.10.3
  * deps: mocha@2.3.4
  * perf: enable strict mode
  * perf: use for loops in place of forEach
  * perf: use string concatination for serialization

# 0.2.4 / 2016-01-11

  * Fix regression when setting empty cookie value
    - Ease the new restriction, which is just basic sanity checking
  * Fix cookie value to allow empty value

# 0.2.3 / 2015-10-25

  * Fix cookie `Max-Age` to never be a floating point number

# 0.2.2 / 2015-09-17

  * Fix regression when setting a cookie array value
  * perf: enable strict mode

# 0.2.1 / 2015-08-13

  * Fix `domain` option to accept `false` and `null`

# 0.2.0 / 2015-08-13

  * Add `firstPartyOnly` option
  * Throw better error for invalid argument to parse
  * Throw on invalid values provided to `serialize`
    - Ensures the resulting string is a valid HTTP header value
  * Throw when `secure` is provided without `https:` request
  * deps: eslint@1.1.0
  * perf: reduce the scope of try-catch deopt
  * perf: remove argument reassignment

# 0.1.5 / 2015-05-19

  * deps: keygrip@~1.0.1
    - Fix timing attacks when using keys of different lengths

# 0.1.4 / 2015-05-12

  * Add `httpOnly` option for disabling the `HttpOnly` attribute
  * Add `encode` option for custom value encoding
  * Fix case where `path` option provided as numbers
  * deps: mocha@2.2.5

# 0.1.3 / 2015-03-12

  * Add `maxAge` option compatibility with old `expires` option
  * Fix preservation of `nextIndex` in `parse`

# 0.1.2 / 2014-04-16

  * Remove unnecessary files from npm package

# 0.1.1 / 2014-02-23

  * Fix bad parse when cookie value contained a comma
  * Fix support for `maxAge` of `0`

# 0.1.0 / 2013-05-01

  * Add `decode` option
  * Add `secure` option
  * Improve test coverage

# 0.0.6 / 2013-04-08

  * Add `path` option

# 0.0.5 / 2012-10-29

  * Add `domain` option

# 0.0.4 / 2012-08-10

  * Fix for expires option

# 0.0.3 / 2012-07-12

  * Add more tests

# 0.0.2 / 2012-06-28

  * Implement `maxAge` option
  * Implement `expires` option
  * Implement `path` option

# 0.0.1 / 2012-06-25

  * Initial release
